name: SQL - Get count of Leads with NULL Last Changed on Date

content.query:
SELECT 
'FHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads]
 where LastChangedOn is null
 
 UNION
 
 SELECT 
'PHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_Lds_Leads]
 where LastChangedOn is null

UNION

SELECT 
'HSI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_Lds_Leads]
 where LastChangedOn is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'PBC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads]
 where LastChangedOn is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'RTW' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_Lds_Leads]
 where LastChangedOn is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'SWR' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_Lds_Leads]
 where LastChangedOn is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'MAC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_Lds_Leads]
 where LastChangedOn is null
